# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] Skill/template/reference/workflow
- [ ] Project skeleton
- [ ] Validation or tests
- [ ] Other

## Validation

Commands run:

```bash
# example
cd cli
npm test
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is small and focused.
- [ ] Tests or validation were run.
- [ ] Docs were updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] No unrelated files were changed.
- [ ] Risks or follow-up work are documented.
